{{Quote|Keep watching the skies.|Anti-Air Super Battle Droid|<ref name="Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''</ref>}}
The '''Anti-Air Super Battle Droid''' was a battle droid used by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. This unit had no arms, copper-colored armor plating, and was armed with one or two air defense [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile launchers]] on its shoulders. This weapons platform was very effective against all air units, however was not as hardy as [[IG-227 Hailfire-class droid tank/Legends|Hailfire droids]], and [[Nantex-class territorial defense starfighter/Legends|Geonosian Fighters]].
